# George's Mexican Restaurant

> Family-owned restaurant serving authentic Mexican and Honduran cuisine in Mandeville, Louisiana for over 40 years. Known for fresh tacos, fajitas, margaritas, weekly specials, live music, and catering on the Northshore.

## Key facts

- Address: 1461 N. Causeway Blvd, Mandeville, LA 70471, United States
- Phone: (985) 626-4342
- Cuisine: Mexican, Honduran, Tex-Mex
- Hours: Sunday–Thursday 11:00 AM–9:00 PM; Friday–Saturday 11:00 AM–10:00 PM
- Price range: $$ (casual, family-friendly)
- Online ordering (pickup): https://www.restaurantlogin.com/api/fb/_q4xrw
- Table reservations: https://georgesmexicanrestaurant.com/reservations
- Owner: Egla Guevara

## Weekly specials

- All day, every day: 2-for-1 draft beer
- Monday–Friday: Happy hour 2 PM–5 PM
- Tuesday: unlimited $5.50 house margaritas after 5 PM (with minimum $10.50 purchase)
- Wednesday: kids eat free (with adult entree), 50% off bottled wine, 2-for-1 frozen flavored margaritas

## Events

- Monday: Chess Club at 4 PM
- Tuesday, Friday, Saturday: live music 6 PM–9 PM

## Pages

- [Menu](https://georgesmexicanrestaurant.com/menu): full menu — antojitos, salads & bowls, carnes, Texas style, seafood, enchiladas, desserts, a la carte, cantina
- [Catering](https://georgesmexicanrestaurant.com/catering): catering menu for parties, office lunches, and celebrations
- [Reservations](https://georgesmexicanrestaurant.com/reservations): book a table
- [Specials & Events](https://georgesmexicanrestaurant.com/gallery): weekly specials, live music, and community events
- [About Us](https://georgesmexicanrestaurant.com/about-us): family story and restaurant history

## Social

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/georgesmexicanrestaurant/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/georgesmexicanrestaurant
